response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Google, along with relevant cloud and tooling work, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Google
Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, cloud platforms, and scalable systems
Active open-source contributor with tools relevant to AI/ML development
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in resume
8+ years of AI production experience not clearly demonstrated; roles are broad and mixed
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
